title: Metalized
description: Adds more variants of iron, gold, diamonds etc. blocks!
body:
[![github](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/github_vector.svg)](https://github.com/Onako2/metalized/releases) [![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/metalized)  

[![generic-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/translate/generic-plural_vector.svg)](https://github.com/Onako2/metalized/blob/main/src/main/resources/assets/metalized/lang/en_us.json)

# Metalized

This is a Minecraft mod that adds various types of stairs and ladders. In the future there will be more blocks and items!

Currently available in these languages:
- [German 🇩🇪](https://github.com/Onako2/metalized/commit/38039be4b41d17155a3d710e8fff081b89f39276)
- [Russian 🇷🇺](https://github.com/Onako2/metalized/commit/355b0f503b26da5e3b19cda30d8e23700da8cfdd)
- English 🇬🇧

**You are allowed to put the mod into modpacks :)**

# How to craft something?
You can craft the things like the vanilla equivalents! That means that you can just craft a stair like a vanilla stair or vanilla ladder!

## Why download it?
You would probably download this because of these reasons: 
- Why not?
- FOSS

**When creating videos about the mod and you want to be visible on this page then ask on Discord in a ticket!**
